name: Robert Townsend
bio: Robert Townsend is an American actor, comedian, director, and writer who gained national exposure in the 1980s through stand-up and appearances on The Tonight Show Starring Johnny Carson. He wrote, directed, produced, and starred in the 1987 satire Hollywood Shuffle, and created the CableACE Award-winning HBO variety series Robert Townsend and His Partners in Crime.

timeline.ev: Wrote, directed, and starred in Hollywood Shuffle
Created HBOs Robert Townsend and His Partners in Crime

accolades: CableACE Award for Robert Townsend and His Partners in Crime

specials.t: Robert Townsend and His Partners in Crime
